evals.prompt: We have six weeks to launch an AI recruiting marketplace with profiles, chat, scheduling, payments, and matching. Scope the real MVP.
evals.expected_output: Identifies the riskiest market assumption, creates a thin value path, cuts unsupported systems, preserves trust, and defines evidence thresholds.

evals.prompt: This internal migration plan has 40 tasks. Find a smaller proof slice before we commit to the full move.
evals.expected_output: Creates a reversible tracer slice with technical success criteria and rollout boundaries rather than arbitrarily removing mandatory migration work.
